creation_context.raw_content_preview:
# Browser-use normalized trajectory: 02-form-filling

Source file: `examples/getting_started/02_form_filling.py`

## Original task excerpt

Go to https://httpbin.org/forms/post and fill out the contact form with:
    - Customer name: John Doe
    - Telephone: 555-123-4567
    - Email: john.doe@example.com
    - Size: Medium
    - Topping: cheese
    - Delivery time: now
    - Comments: This is a test form submission
    
    Then submit the form and tell me what response you get.

## Normalized
